entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: The spotted stem borer insect used as the subject of the genetic study

entities.name: DIAPAUSE
entities.description: An endocrine controlled arrested metabolic state to delay development or reproduction under unfavorable conditions

entities.name: UNFAVORABLE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that trigger the onset of diapause

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The breeding of different strains to examine genetic inheritance

entities.name: RECIPROCAL CROSSES
entities.description: Breeding where parents' sexes are swapped to identify maternal effects

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive capacity of the insect

entities.name: EGG HATCHING
entities.description: The success rate of embryos emerging from eggs

entities.name: LARVAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The ability of larvae to survive to subsequent stages

entities.name: DIAPAUSE INDUCTION
entities.description: The process of entering the diapause state

entities.name: DIAPAUSE TERMINATION
entities.description: The process of exiting the diapause state

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of adults emerging from the pupal stage

entities.name: MORPHOMETRICS
entities.description: The quantitative measurement of larvae, pupae, and adults

entities.name: GENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of inheritance patterns in the different strains

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to determine the performance of specific parental combinations

entities.name: DEGREE OF DOMINANCE ESTIMATES
entities.description: Estimates used to determine the type of gene action governing traits

entities.name: OVER DOMINANCE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects where the heterozygote is superior to both homozygotes

entities.name: HIBERNATING STRAIN
entities.description: A strain of Chilo partellus that undergoes winter diapause

entities.name: AESTIVATING STRAIN
entities.description: A strain of Chilo partellus that undergoes summer diapause

entities.name: POST-HIBERNATING STRAIN
entities.description: A strain of Chilo partellus that has emerged from hibernation

entities.name: POST-AESTIVATING STRAIN
entities.description: A strain of Chilo partellus that has emerged from aestivation

entities.name: NONDIAPAUSE STRAIN
entities.description: A strain of Chilo partellus that does not enter diapause

entities.name: INSECTS
entities.description: The general class of organisms in which diapause regulation is studied
